authority_model.description: Single normalized registry artifact for features, claims, tests, and evidence.
authority_model.name: universal-certification-registry

claims.claim_title: The active 0.3.19.dev1 line is not certifiably fully featured.
The active 0.3.19.dev1 line is not certifiably fully RFC compliant.
Engine-family datatype alignment lacks feature-specific proof slices.
Rust backend claims must remain blocked until Python-vs-Rust parity lanes pass as release evidence.
Tigrcorn interop and benchmark certification claims must remain blocked until governed release evidence populates the public bundle targets.
Tigrcorn hardening and negative-certification claims must remain blocked until profile-specific negative corpora run as governed release evidence.
The active line cannot be promoted until claim lifecycle prerequisites and preserved release evidence are complete.
Stable release 0.3.18 remains the frozen current certification boundary.
OpenAPI 3.1.0 and JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 emission remain in boundary for the frozen release.
JSON-RPC 2.0 and OpenRPC 1.2.6 framework surfaces remain in the frozen release boundary.
Retained RFC 7235, RFC 7617, and RFC 6750 rows remain current-boundary claims.
Operator surfaces closed by the operator-surface checkpoint remain current-boundary claims.
Unified tigrbl CLI command and flag surface remains current-boundary scope.
Active line 0.3.19.dev1 exists as governed next-target work only and is not a certified release.
Gate A through Gate E evidence exists for stable release 0.3.18.
Release-grade claim rows are mapped to evidence artifacts.
Frozen release 0.3.18 remains honestly describable as certifiably fully featured within the declared boundary.
Frozen release 0.3.18 remains honestly describable as certifiably fully RFC/spec compliant within the declared boundary.
DataTypeSpec and StorageTypeRef define the active canonical semantic datatype center for the next target.
ColumnSpec.datatype is the canonical datatype attachment point on the active next-target line.
TypeAdapter, BaseTypeAdapter, and TypeRegistry provide the executable datatype contract on the active next-target line.
EngineTypeLowerer, EngineRegistry, and EngineDatatypeBridge control engine-owned lowering on the active next-target line.
ReflectedTypeMapper governs reverse mapping and reflection import behavior on the active next-target line.
Relational, dataframe, file, cache, and probabilistic engine families align to the datatype bridge contract on the active next-target line.
Table portability and interoperability rules are specified as governed next-target work on the active line.
Reflection-driven round-trip schema recovery is defined with best-effort and metadata-preserving modes on the active next-target line.

`tigrcorn` remains an explicitly supported server runner on the active next-target line.
`uvicorn` remains an explicitly supported server runner on the active next-target line.

features.feature_description: DataTypeSpec and StorageTypeRef define the active canonical semantic datatype center for the next target. Package owner `pkgs/core/tigrbl_core` and crate owner `crates/tigrbl_rs_spec` define the tracked implementation surface.

ColumnSpec.datatype is the canonical datatype attachment point on the active next-target line. Package owner `pkgs/core/tigrbl_core` and crate owner `crates/tigrbl_rs_spec` define the tracked implementation surface.

TypeAdapter, BaseTypeAdapter, and TypeRegistry provide the executable datatype contract on the active next-target line. Package owner `pkgs/core/tigrbl_core` and crate owner `crates/tigrbl_rs_spec` define the tracked implementation surface.

EngineTypeLowerer, EngineRegistry, and EngineDatatypeBridge control engine-owned lowering on the active next-target line. Package owner `pkgs/core/tigrbl_core` and crate owner `crates/tigrbl_rs_spec` define the tracked implementation surface.

ReflectedTypeMapper governs reverse mapping and reflection import behavior on the active next-target line. Package owner `pkgs/core/tigrbl_core` and crate owner `crates/tigrbl_rs_spec` define the tracked implementation surface.
features.feature_name: Reflected type mapper and reverse mapping

features.feature_description: Relational, dataframe, file, cache, and probabilistic engine families align to the datatype bridge contract on the active next-target line. Package owner `pkgs/engines` and crate owner `crates/tigrbl_rs_engine_inmemory` define the tracked implementation surface.

Table portability and interoperability rules are specified as governed next-target work on the active line. Package owner `pkgs/core/tigrbl_core` and crate owner `crates/tigrbl_rs_spec` define the tracked implementation surface.

Reflection-driven round-trip schema recovery is defined with best-effort and metadata-preserving modes on the active next-target line. Package owner `pkgs/core/tigrbl_core` and crate owner `crates/tigrbl_rs_spec` define the tracked implementation surface.

naming_conventions.notes: Claim families include CUR, NEXT, BLK, and EVD.
Bundle roots group related evidence artifacts.
Artifact IDs are stable for a given sorted path set.
One row per test case in the universal registry.
naming_conventions.source_id_format: derived from normalized test file path

naming_conventions.notes: Groups related test cases by containing set directory.
